inputs.label: Rise
inputs.businessContext: Vertical height from top of wall plate to ridge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical height from top of wall plate to ridge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duvar levhasının üstünden mahyaya kadar dikey yükseklik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikale Höhe von der Oberkante der Wandplatte bis zum First.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur verticale du dessus de la sablière au faîte.

inputs.label: Span (Building Width)
inputs.businessContext: Total horizontal width of the building (from outside of one wall to outside of opposite wall), equal to 2 × run.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total horizontal width of the building (from outside of one wall to outside of opposite wall), equal to 2 × run.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Binanın toplam yatay genişliği (bir duvarın dışından karşı duvarın dışına), 2 × koşuya eşit.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte horizontale Breite des Gebäudes (von Außenkante einer Wand bis Außenkante der gegenüberliegenden Wand), entspricht 2 × Sparrenlänge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur horizontale totale du bâtiment (d'un mur extérieur à l'autre), égale à 2 × la demi-portée.

inputs.label: Roof Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the roof along the ridge (perpendicular to the span).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the roof along the ridge (perpendicular to the span).
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge des Daches entlang des Firsts (senkrecht zur Spannweite).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur du toit le long du faîte (perpendiculaire à la portée).

inputs.label: Eave Overhang
inputs.businessContext: Additional horizontal projection of the roof beyond the wall.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional horizontal projection of the roof beyond the wall.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çatının duvarın ötesindeki ek yatay çıkıntısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher horizontaler Überstand des Daches über die Wand hinaus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Projection horizontale supplémentaire du toit au-delà du mur.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
